concerns.text: Fallback datasets (gorilla-llm/Berkeley-Function-Calling-Leaderboard, AdityaMayukhSom/MixSub-LLaMA-3.2) are not in the spec. These should either be removed from the plan or the spec should be updated to include them as optional alternatives.

FR-008 requires documenting thresholds with community-standard justification. The plan mentions thresholds (±20%, 95%, p<0.05) but does not explicitly document community-standard justification for the ±20% filtering threshold or 95% parsing success threshold.
